channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Final Fantasy Tactics Update 1.5.0 Launches Today
item.description: The 1.5.0 update for Final Fantasy Tactics: The Ivalice Chronicles is now available, introducing new features and improvements. Check out the full patch notes for details.

item.title: Switch Online Offers Free Month for 12-Month Memberships
item.description: Nintendo is providing a limited-time offer of a free bonus month for new 12-month memberships to Switch Online + Expansion Pack in the US. Don't miss out on this deal!

item.title: SanDisk Launches 8TB PS5 SSD Priced at $3800
item.description: SanDisk has unveiled its new 8TB Optimus GX PRO SSD for PS5, priced at a staggering $3800. This high-capacity drive aims to enhance gaming storage solutions.

item.title: Android 17 Update Rolling Out to Pixel Devices
item.description: The Android 17 update is now being rolled out to Pixel phones and watches, bringing various enhancements. Users can expect improvements but no major changes.

item.title: Sony Faces Security Issues with PS5 Game Profiles
item.description: PS5 users report unauthorized games appearing on their profiles, prompting Sony to address security concerns. The company is working on a fix.

item.title: Steam Machine CPU Benchmark Results Underwhelm
item.description: Recent Geekbench 6 CPU benchmarks for the Steam Machine show mediocre performance compared to current handhelds. Concerns about its competitiveness arise.

item.title: Xbox May Shut Down South of Midnight & Hellblade Studios
item.description: Reports suggest Xbox is considering shutting down Compulsion Games and Ninja Theory. These studios are negotiating to remain operational amid challenges.

item.title: Samsung S95H OLED TV Review: Good, Not Great
item.description: The Samsung S95H OLED TV excels in gaming but falls short in color performance. It offers solid features but lacks the expected 'Ultra' quality.

item.title: Gmail's AI Summaries Now Available Globally
item.description: Gmail's AI email summaries are now accessible to all users worldwide, enhancing email management without requiring a paid plan. Users can opt-out if desired.

item.title: Commodore Launches Digital Detox Phone
item.description: The Commodore Callback 8020 is a retro-style flip phone designed for digital detox, featuring T9 texting and limited app access. It blocks social media apps.

item.title: Assassin's Creed Shadows Final Update Released
item.description: Ubisoft announces the final update for Assassin's Creed Shadows, including improvements for Switch 2. This marks the end of support for the game.

item.title: Apple iPhone 18 Pro Likely Launching September 2026
item.description: Apple's schedule hints at a September 2026 launch for the iPhone 18 Pro and its variants. Anticipation builds for new features and designs.

item.title: Galaxy Book6 Edge Launches with AI Performance
item.description: Samsung's Galaxy Book6 Edge is now available, featuring next-gen AI performance and premium portability for productivity. It's designed for modern users.

item.title: Benefits of Sunlight Explored in New Book
item.description: The book 'In Defense of Sunlight' discusses the health benefits of sunlight exposure and how to safely enjoy it. It challenges common misconceptions about sun exposure.

item.title: Google Search Introduces Paid Information Agents
item.description: Google is launching Information agents in AI Mode for a fee, enhancing search capabilities for users willing to pay. This feature was announced at Google I/O.
